channel.title: Fitness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Fitness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: An Overview of Functional Strength Training for Everyday Life
item.description: Functional strength training focuses on movements that build practical fitness applicable to daily activities and long-term physical wellness.

item.title: Practical Tips for Cleaning Home Gym Equipment
item.description: Keeping home gym equipment properly sanitized helps maintain hygiene and extends the lifespan of fitness gear used in personal workout spaces.

item.title: Recovery Strategies to Help Busy Professionals Sustain Energy and Performance
item.description: Targeted recovery routines can help professionals who keep demanding schedules maintain consistent energy levels and physical performance over time.

item.title: Cycling Training Log: Recovery Rides and Interval Work Ahead of Rainy Weather
item.description: A cyclist describes their recent training week, mixing a light recovery ride after a hard group session with more intensive interval work before expected rain.

item.title: Rehabilitation Exercises for Runners Dealing with Knee Pain
item.description: A selection of targeted exercises designed to help runners recover from knee pain and gradually return to regular training without aggravating the injury.
